abilities.name: Guiding Presence
abilities.description: Aeldari Psyker model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Harmonisation Matrix
abilities.description: Aeldari model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or any Transport it is embarked within) is within range of an objective marker you control, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Spirit Stone of Raelyth
abilities.description: Aeldari Psyker model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly Aeldari Vehicle units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Guileful Strategist
abilities.description: Aeldari model only. If your army includes the bearer, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Aeldari Vehicle units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Aspect of Murder
abilities.description: **^^Autarch^^** or **^^Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Mantle of Wisdom
abilities.description: ^^**Autarch^^** or ^^**Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading an ^^**Aspect Warriors^^** unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Shimmerstone
abilities.description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Strategic Savant
abilities.description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Gaze of Ynnead
abilities.description: Farseer model only. The bearer's Eldritch Storm weapon has the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

abilities.name: Storm of Whispers
abilities.description: Warlock model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Borrowed Vigour
abilities.description: **^^Archon^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Morbid Might
abilities.description: Succubus model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Cegorach's Coil
abilities.description: Troupe Master model only. Each time the bearer's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer's unit that is within Engagment Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abilities.name: Mask of Secrets
abilities.description: Harlequins model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Murder's Jest
abilities.description: Death Jester model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below Half-strength, each successful Hit scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Mistweave
abilities.description: Shadowseer model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Craftworld's Champion
abilities.description: Asuryani model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

abilities.name: Ethereal Pathway
abilities.description: Asuryani model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two Guardians units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Protector of the Paths
abilities.description: Asuryani model only. While the bearer is leading a Dire Avengers or Guardians unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

abilities.name: Breath of Vaul
abilities.description: **^^Asuryani^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a **^^Storm Guardians^^** unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re-roll the result, and each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a Guardian fusion gun in that unit, you can re-roll the result.

abilities.name: Crucible of Malediction
abilities.description: **^^Haemonculus^^** model only. Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend 1 Pain token. Then, each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if you spent 1 Pain token. Each time a **^^Psyker^^** unit fails that test, it suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Eye of Spite
abilities.description: **^^Succubus^^** model only. Improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer's unit is selected to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

abilities.name: Labyrinthine Cunning
abilities.description:
**^^Archon^^** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can do one of the following:
Spend 1 Pain token and gain 1CP.
Roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Dark Vitality
abilities.description: **^^Drukhari^^** model only. The bearer's unit is always Empowered - you do not need to spend any Pain tokens to activate that unit's Pain abilities

abilities.name: Archraider
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^, that ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^ has the Scouts 9" ability.

abilities.name: Webway walker
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if that unit is currently losing the wager, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Reaper's Cowl
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth and Infiltrators abilities.

abilities.name: Conductor of Torment
abilities.description:
^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In your Command phase, you can do one of the following:
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently losing the wager, you can gain 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Drukhari**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently winning the wager, you can discard 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Harlequins**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.

abilities.name: Lucid Eye
abilities.description: Asuryani Psyker model only. In your Command phase, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the value of one Fate dice in your Fate dice pool.

abilities.name: Runes of Warding
abilities.description: Asuryani Psyker model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds, Psychic Attacks and Critical Wounds caused by attacks with the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

abilities.name: Stone of Eldritch Fury
abilities.description: Asuryani Psyker model only. Add 12" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Torc of Morai-Heg
abilities.description: Asuryani Psyker model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of the bearer with a Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, increase the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Phantasmal Smoke
abilities.description:
^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of a friendly ^^**Drukhari Transport**^^:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the  Stealth ability
Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Sadistic Fulcrum
abilities.description: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower the bearer’s unit in the Shooting phase, select one friendly ^^**Drukhari Transport**^^ within 6" of the bearer’s unit; until the end of the phase, each time that ^^**Transport**^^ makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Spiteful Raider
abilities.description: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase, if that enemy unit was within range of one or more objective markers when the bearer’s unit was selected to fight, you gain 1 additional Pain token.

abilities.name: Nightmare Shroud
abilities.description: ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a ^^**Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Light of Clarity
abilities.description: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of Infanty models in that unit and add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of Monster models in that unit.

abilities.name: Stave of Kurnous
abilities.description: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer (excluding Titanic units). Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the [Precision] ability.

abilities.name: Rune of Mists
abilities.description: Spiritseer model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, unless the attacking model is within 18, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Higher Duty
abilities.description: Spiritseer model only. Oncer per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, the bearer's unit can make a normal move of up to 6".

abilities.name: Psychic Destroyer
abilities.description: ^^Asuryani^^ ^^Psyker^^ model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Phoenix Gem
abilities.description: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one of more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Gift of Foresight
abilities.description: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Timeless Strategist
abilities.description: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any Transport it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

abilities.name: Firstdrawn Blade
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

abilities.name: Mirage Field
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Seersight Strike
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted Psyker model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer have the [Anti-Monster 2+] and [Anti-Vehicle 2+] abilities.

abilities.name: Echoes of Ulthanesh
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent's deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Master Regenesist
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Each time the bearer uses its Fleshcraft ability, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed Bodyguard models to the bearer's unit instead of D3+1.

abilities.name: Master Nemesine
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. The bearer's weapons have the ^^**[Anti-Beast 2+]**^^ and ^^**[Anti-Monster 4+]**^^ abilities.

abilities.name: Master Artisan
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 1 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Master Repugnomancer [Aura]
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer's Fear Incarnate ability, and each time a friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ within 9" of the bearer fails a Battle-shock test or is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

abilities.name: Leechbite Plate
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+. At the start of either player's Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Webway Awl
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability, and you can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Informant Network
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three ^^**Kabalite Warriors**^^ and/or ^^**Hand of the Archon**^^ units from your army; those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Towering Arrogance
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ models only. While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Pharmacophex
abilities.description: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. At the start of your Command phase, after selecting which Combat Drugs will be active for your army, roll one D6 and consult the Combat Drugs list. The result rolled applies to the bearer's unit until the start of your next Command phase in addition to any other Combat Drugs that are active for your army. If you randomly select one that is already active for your army, it has no additional effect.

abilities.name: Chronoshard
abilities.description: ^^** Succubus**^^ model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Periapt of Torments
abilities.description: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Morghenna's Curse
abilities.description: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Key of Ghosts
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only (excluding ^^**Solitaire**^^ models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Fanged Leer
abilities.description: ^^**Death Jester**^^ model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

abilities.name: Shedskin Raiment
abilities.description: ^^**Shadowseer**^^ model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Harlequins units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Weavers' Wail
abilities.description: ^^**Troupe Master**^^ model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Pirate Prince
abilities.description: ^^**Prince Yriel**^^ unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

abilities.name: Alacritous Assault
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[LANCE]**^^ ability.

abilities.name: Exotic Munitions
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[ANTI‑MONSTER 5+]**^^ and ^^**[ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+]**^^ abilities.

abilities.name: Adrenal Infusions
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

abilities.name: Infamy (Aura)
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. While an enemy unit is within 3” of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

abilities.name: Webway Pathstone
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this ability. If it does, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Archraider
abilities.description:
^^**Anhrathe Character**^^ unit only. At the start of the battle, select one ^^**Character**^^ model in this unit. That model has the following ability: 


**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12” of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Voidstone
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Farseer)
abilities.description: A Farseer Skyrunner has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Branching Fates (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, once per phase you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll, or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Misfortune (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Wound roll. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Warlock Skyrunners
■ Windriders

abilities.name: Footfalls of Fate
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this unit and, in your Movement phase, each time a model in it moves, it can move through enemy models (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Webway Spar
abilities.description: Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. Each unit can only use this ability once per battle.

abilities.name: Spirit of Eldanesh
abilities.description: Psychic weapons equipped by models in this unit unit have the **[ANTI-MONSTER 3+]** and **[ANTI-VEHICLE 3+]** abilities.

abilities.name: Dead-eye Shots
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Khaine's Vengeance
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6, subtracting 2 if that unit is a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^**: on a 2+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Tactical Teachings
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within range or one or more objective markers, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against this attack.

abilities.name: Nimble Fighters
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Battlewraiths
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Sunshock Fire Patterns
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Paths of the Pathless
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, you can select up to two friendly **^^Aeldari Infantry^^** units within 6" of that unit that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Strategic Philosopher
abilities.description: In your Command phase, if this unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control and it is not Battle-shocked, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Master Misdirector
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, select up to two **^^Aeldari^^** units from your Crusade army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Raidcraft Workshop
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one **^^Drukhari Vehicle^^** or **^^Drukhari Mounted^^** unit from your Crusade army. Until the end of the battle, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Weapon Forge
abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select one **^^Drukhari^^** unit from your Crusade army (you cannot select an **^^Epic Hero^^** or a unit that has the Weapon Modification Battle Honour). Until the end of the battle, one weapon equipped by one model in that unit has the Weapon Modification Battle Honour.

abilities.name: Toxin Distillery
abilities.description: While your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Arena
abilities.description: In the Update Crusade Cards step, if a **^^Drukhari^^** unit from your Crusade army would gain XP from Dealers of Death, it gains 1 additional XP.

abilities.name: Scourge Spire
abilities.description: In the Update Crusade Cards step, if a **^^Scourges^^** unit from your Crusade army would gain XP from Battle Experience, it gains 1 additional XP.

abilities.name: Incubi Shrine
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** can be attached to an **^^Incubi^^** unit (if your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is an **^^Archon^^**, while it is leading an **^^Incubi^^** unit, your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability). If your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is attached to an **^^Incubi^^** unit, at the end of the battle, unless all of those Bodyguard models have been destroyed, you can re-roll all Leadership tests required as the result of Assassination Attempts during that battle's Rival Activities.

abilities.name: Dock
abilities.description: After each battle, in the Update Crusade Cards step, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you were the victor: on a 4+, you gain 1 additional RP.

abilities.name: Sprawl Slum
abilities.description: At the start of the Select Crusade Blessings step, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if you are the Underdog: on a 6+, you can use one additional Crusade Blessing this battle (even if you are not the Underdog).

abilities.name: Flesh Market
abilities.description: Once at the end of each battle, you can re-roll one Out of Action test taken for one **^^Drukhari Infantry^^** or **^^Drukhari Monster^^** unit from your Crusade army.

abilities.name: Shadow District
abilities.description: Each time a Rival Lord makes an Activity roll, you can subtract 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Noble Spire
abilities.description: At the start of the Select Agendas step, roll one D6: on a 4+, you can select one additional Drukhari Agenda to use in that battle.

abilities.name: Gang Territory
abilities.description: Each time your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** attempts a Hostile Takeover, add 1 to its D6 result and, if that **^^Ascendant Lord^^** claims a territory as a result, increase your Crusade force's Supply Limit by 50 points.

abilities.name: Guiding Presence
abilities.description: Aeldari Psyker model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Harmonisation Matrix
abilities.description: Aeldari model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or any Transport it is embarked within) is within range of an objective marker you control, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Spirit Stone of Raelyth
abilities.description: Aeldari Psyker model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly Aeldari Vehicle units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Guileful Strategist
abilities.description: Aeldari model only. If your army includes the bearer, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Aeldari Vehicle units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Aspect of Murder
abilities.description: **^^Autarch^^** or **^^Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Mantle of Wisdom
abilities.description: ^^**Autarch^^** or ^^**Autarch Wayleaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading an ^^**Aspect Warriors^^** unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Shimmerstone
abilities.description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Strategic Savant
abilities.description: Autarch or Autarch Wayleaper model only. While the bearer is leading an Aspect Warriors unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Gaze of Ynnead
abilities.description: Farseer model only. The bearer's Eldritch Storm weapon has the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

abilities.name: Storm of Whispers
abilities.description: Warlock model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Borrowed Vigour
abilities.description: **^^Archon^^** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Morbid Might
abilities.description: Succubus model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Cegorach's Coil
abilities.description: Troupe Master model only. Each time the bearer's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer's unit that is within Engagment Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abilities.name: Mask of Secrets
abilities.description: Harlequins model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Murder's Jest
abilities.description: Death Jester model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below Half-strength, each successful Hit scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Mistweave
abilities.description: Shadowseer model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Craftworld's Champion
abilities.description: Asuryani model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

abilities.name: Ethereal Pathway
abilities.description: Asuryani model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two Guardians units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Protector of the Paths
abilities.description: Asuryani model only. While the bearer is leading a Dire Avengers or Guardians unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

abilities.name: Breath of Vaul
abilities.description: **^^Asuryani^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a **^^Storm Guardians^^** unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re-roll the result, and each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a Guardian fusion gun in that unit, you can re-roll the result.

abilities.name: Crucible of Malediction
abilities.description: **^^Haemonculus^^** model only. Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend 1 Pain token. Then, each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if you spent 1 Pain token. Each time a **^^Psyker^^** unit fails that test, it suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Eye of Spite
abilities.description: **^^Succubus^^** model only. Improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer's unit is selected to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

abilities.name: Labyrinthine Cunning
abilities.description:
**^^Archon^^** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can do one of the following:
Spend 1 Pain token and gain 1CP.
Roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Dark Vitality
abilities.description: **^^Drukhari^^** model only. The bearer's unit is always Empowered - you do not need to spend any Pain tokens to activate that unit's Pain abilities

abilities.name: Archraider
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^, that ^^**Dedicated Transport**^^ has the Scouts 9" ability.

abilities.name: Webway walker
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ or ^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if that unit is currently losing the wager, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Reaper's Cowl
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth and Infiltrators abilities.

abilities.name: Conductor of Torment
abilities.description:
^^**Drukhari**^^ model only. In your Command phase, you can do one of the following:
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently losing the wager, you can gain 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Drukhari**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.
■ If your ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are currently winning the wager, you can discard 1 Pain token. If you do, ^^**Harlequins**^^ units from your army are now winning the wager.

abilities.name: Phoenix Gem
abilities.description: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one of more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Gift of Foresight
abilities.description: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Timeless Strategist
abilities.description: ^^Asuryani^^ model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any Transport it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

abilities.name: Firstdrawn Blade
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

abilities.name: Mirage Field
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Seersight Strike
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted Psyker model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer have the [Anti-Monster 2+] and [Anti-Vehicle 2+] abilities.

abilities.name: Echoes of Ulthanesh
abilities.description: Asuryani Mounted model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent's deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Master Regenesist
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Each time the bearer uses its Fleshcraft ability, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed Bodyguard models to the bearer's unit instead of D3+1.

abilities.name: Master Nemesine
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. The bearer's weapons have the ^^**[Anti-Beast 2+]**^^ and ^^**[Anti-Monster 4+]**^^ abilities.

abilities.name: Master Artisan
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 1 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Master Repugnomancer [Aura]
abilities.description: ^^**Haemonculus**^^ model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer's Fear Incarnate ability, and each time a friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ within 9" of the bearer fails a Battle-shock test or is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

abilities.name: Leechbite Plate
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+. At the start of either player's Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Webway Awl
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability, and you can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Informant Network
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three ^^**Kabalite Warriors**^^ and/or ^^**Hand of the Archon**^^ units from your army; those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Towering Arrogance
abilities.description: ^^**Archon**^^ models only. While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Pharmacophex
abilities.description: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. At the start of your Command phase, after selecting which Combat Drugs will be active for your army, roll one D6 and consult the Combat Drugs list. The result rolled applies to the bearer's unit until the start of your next Command phase in addition to any other Combat Drugs that are active for your army. If you randomly select one that is already active for your army, it has no additional effect.

abilities.name: Chronoshard
abilities.description: ^^** Succubus**^^ model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Periapt of Torments
abilities.description: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Morghenna's Curse
abilities.description: ^^**Succubus**^^ model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Key of Ghosts
abilities.description: ^^**Harlequins**^^ model only (excluding ^^**Solitaire**^^ models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Fanged Leer
abilities.description: ^^**Death Jester**^^ model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

abilities.name: Shedskin Raiment
abilities.description: ^^**Shadowseer**^^ model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Harlequins units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Weavers' Wail
abilities.description: ^^**Troupe Master**^^ model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Pirate Prince
abilities.description: ^^**Prince Yriel**^^ unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

abilities.name: Alacritous Assault
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[LANCE]**^^ ability.

abilities.name: Exotic Munitions
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the ^^**[ANTI‑MONSTER 5+]**^^ and ^^**[ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+]**^^ abilities.

abilities.name: Adrenal Infusions
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

abilities.name: Infamy (Aura)
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. While an enemy unit is within 3” of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

abilities.name: Webway Pathstone
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this ability. If it does, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Archraider
abilities.description:
^^**Anhrathe Character**^^ unit only. At the start of the battle, select one ^^**Character**^^ model in this unit. That model has the following ability: 


**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12” of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Voidstone
abilities.description: ^^**Anhrathe Infantry**^^ unit only. Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Assured Destruction
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a ^^Monster^^ or ^^Vehicle^^ unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Aspect Shrine Token
abilities.description:
Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to an unmodified 6.

For every 5 models in this unit, it can have 1 Aspect Shrine token.

abilities.name: Footfalls of Fate
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this unit and, in your Movement phase, each time a model in it moves, it can move through enemy models (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Webway Spar
abilities.description: Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. Each unit can only use this ability once per battle.

abilities.name: Spirit of Eldanesh
abilities.description: Psychic weapons equipped by models in this unit unit have the **[ANTI-MONSTER 3+]** and **[ANTI-VEHICLE 3+]** abilities.

abilities.name: Dead-eye Shots
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Khaine's Vengeance
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6, subtracting 2 if that unit is a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^**: on a 2+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Tactical Teachings
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within range or one or more objective markers, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against this attack.

abilities.name: Nimble Fighters
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Battlewraiths
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Sunshock Fire Patterns
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Paths of the Pathless
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, you can select up to two friendly **^^Aeldari Infantry^^** units within 6" of that unit that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Strategic Philosopher
abilities.description: In your Command phase, if this unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control and it is not Battle-shocked, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Master Misdirector
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, select up to two **^^Aeldari^^** units from your Crusade army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Raidcraft Workshop
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one **^^Drukhari Vehicle^^** or **^^Drukhari Mounted^^** unit from your Crusade army. Until the end of the battle, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Weapon Forge
abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select one **^^Drukhari^^** unit from your Crusade army (you cannot select an **^^Epic Hero^^** or a unit that has the Weapon Modification Battle Honour). Until the end of the battle, one weapon equipped by one model in that unit has the Weapon Modification Battle Honour.

abilities.name: Toxin Distillery
abilities.description: While your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Arena
abilities.description: In the Update Crusade Cards step, if a **^^Drukhari^^** unit from your Crusade army would gain XP from Dealers of Death, it gains 1 additional XP.

abilities.name: Scourge Spire
abilities.description: In the Update Crusade Cards step, if a **^^Scourges^^** unit from your Crusade army would gain XP from Battle Experience, it gains 1 additional XP.

abilities.name: Incubi Shrine
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** can be attached to an **^^Incubi^^** unit (if your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is an **^^Archon^^**, while it is leading an **^^Incubi^^** unit, your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability). If your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is attached to an **^^Incubi^^** unit, at the end of the battle, unless all of those Bodyguard models have been destroyed, you can re-roll all Leadership tests required as the result of Assassination Attempts during that battle's Rival Activities.

abilities.name: Dock
abilities.description: After each battle, in the Update Crusade Cards step, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you were the victor: on a 4+, you gain 1 additional RP.

abilities.name: Sprawl Slum
abilities.description: At the start of the Select Crusade Blessings step, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if you are the Underdog: on a 6+, you can use one additional Crusade Blessing this battle (even if you are not the Underdog).

abilities.name: Flesh Market
abilities.description: Once at the end of each battle, you can re-roll one Out of Action test taken for one **^^Drukhari Infantry^^** or **^^Drukhari Monster^^** unit from your Crusade army.

abilities.name: Shadow District
abilities.description: Each time a Rival Lord makes an Activity roll, you can subtract 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Noble Spire
abilities.description: At the start of the Select Agendas step, roll one D6: on a 4+, you can select one additional Drukhari Agenda to use in that battle.

abilities.name: Gang Territory
abilities.description: Each time your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** attempts a Hostile Takeover, add 1 to its D6 result and, if that **^^Ascendant Lord^^** claims a territory as a result, increase your Crusade force's Supply Limit by 50 points.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Crystal Matrix
abilities.description: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll and you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

abilities.name: Footfalls of Fate
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this unit and, in your Movement phase, each time a model in it moves, it can move through enemy models (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Fuegan)
abilities.description: Fuegan has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Burning Lance
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 6" to the Range characteristic of Melta weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Unquenchable Resolve
abilities.description: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Fire Dragons

abilities.description: This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

abilities.name: Crewed Platform
abilities.description: When the last Guardian Defender model in this unit is destroyed, any remaining Heavy Weapon Platform models in this unit are also destroyed.

abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within range or one or more objective markers, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against this attack.

abilities.name: Nimble Fighters
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Battlewraiths
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Sunshock Fire Patterns
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Paths of the Pathless
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, you can select up to two friendly **^^Aeldari Infantry^^** units within 6" of that unit that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Strategic Philosopher
abilities.description: In your Command phase, if this unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control and it is not Battle-shocked, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Master Misdirector
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, select up to two **^^Aeldari^^** units from your Crusade army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Raidcraft Workshop
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one **^^Drukhari Vehicle^^** or **^^Drukhari Mounted^^** unit from your Crusade army. Until the end of the battle, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Weapon Forge
abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select one **^^Drukhari^^** unit from your Crusade army (you cannot select an **^^Epic Hero^^** or a unit that has the Weapon Modification Battle Honour). Until the end of the battle, one weapon equipped by one model in that unit has the Weapon Modification Battle Honour.

abilities.name: Toxin Distillery
abilities.description: While your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Arena
abilities.description: In the Update Crusade Cards step, if a **^^Drukhari^^** unit from your Crusade army would gain XP from Dealers of Death, it gains 1 additional XP.

abilities.name: Scourge Spire
abilities.description: In the Update Crusade Cards step, if a **^^Scourges^^** unit from your Crusade army would gain XP from Battle Experience, it gains 1 additional XP.

abilities.name: Incubi Shrine
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** can be attached to an **^^Incubi^^** unit (if your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is an **^^Archon^^**, while it is leading an **^^Incubi^^** unit, your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability). If your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** is attached to an **^^Incubi^^** unit, at the end of the battle, unless all of those Bodyguard models have been destroyed, you can re-roll all Leadership tests required as the result of Assassination Attempts during that battle's Rival Activities.

abilities.name: Dock
abilities.description: After each battle, in the Update Crusade Cards step, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you were the victor: on a 4+, you gain 1 additional RP.

abilities.name: Sprawl Slum
abilities.description: At the start of the Select Crusade Blessings step, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if you are the Underdog: on a 6+, you can use one additional Crusade Blessing this battle (even if you are not the Underdog).

abilities.name: Flesh Market
abilities.description: Once at the end of each battle, you can re-roll one Out of Action test taken for one **^^Drukhari Infantry^^** or **^^Drukhari Monster^^** unit from your Crusade army.

abilities.name: Shadow District
abilities.description: Each time a Rival Lord makes an Activity roll, you can subtract 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Noble Spire
abilities.description: At the start of the Select Agendas step, roll one D6: on a 4+, you can select one additional Drukhari Agenda to use in that battle.

abilities.name: Gang Territory
abilities.description: Each time your **^^Ascendant Lord^^** attempts a Hostile Takeover, add 1 to its D6 result and, if that **^^Ascendant Lord^^** claims a territory as a result, increase your Crusade force's Supply Limit by 50 points.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable Save. This invulnerable save is improved to 4+ against melee attacks.

abilities.name: Acrobatic
abilities.description: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back

abilities.name: Aspect Shrine Token
abilities.description:
Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to an unmodified 6.

For every 5 models in this unit, it can have 1 Aspect Shrine token.

abilities.name: Footfalls of Fate
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this unit and, in your Movement phase, each time a model in it moves, it can move through enemy models (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Webway Spar
abilities.description: Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one unit from your Crusade army with this ability can use it. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. Each unit can only use this ability once per battle.

abilities.name: Spirit of Eldanesh
abilities.description: Psychic weapons equipped by models in this unit unit have the **[ANTI-MONSTER 3+]** and **[ANTI-VEHICLE 3+]** abilities.

abilities.name: Dead-eye Shots
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

abilities.name: Hunter Unseen

abilities.name: Whirling Death
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and each time a model in that unit makes an Advance move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance that model can be moved during that move.

abilities.name: Storm of Silence
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^Character^^ unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Phoenix Lord)

abilities.name: Sustained Assault
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit

abilities.name: The Scorpion's Bite
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability when targeting units without the ^^Titanic^^ keyword

abilities.name: Harvester of Souls
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase, after selecting targets for that unit's attacks, if every attack targets the same unit, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit. On a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by explosive debris; after resolving all of that unit's attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by explosive debris suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Monofilament Web
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its doomweaver scored a hit against an enemy unit, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.
